title: wedelia pusilla
intro: Wedelia pusilla, also known as the dwarf wedelia or dwarf white-flowering creeper, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Wedelia pusilla include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Wedelia pusilla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
